title: Creating a Valid GraphQL Schema
scenario: Craft a prompt that will instruct an LLM to produce a GraphQL schema that defines a complex query, mutation, and subscription types, including nested fields and scalar types. Ensure the LLM output is under 200 lines of code and adheres to standard GraphQL schema best practices.
constraints: Must be under 200 lines of code
Must define query, mutation, and subscription types

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated GraphQL schema meets the constraints provided, including line count and type definitions.
Verify that the generated GraphQL schema is syntactically correct and free of errors.
Check if the generated GraphQL schema accurately represents the complex query, mutation, and subscription types, including nested fields and scalar types.
